---
title: "Roadmap"
subtitle: "Study plan and progress"
---

## Stages and status

| # | Stage | Status |
|---|-------|--------|
| 1 | Capture (emulator + frame grab) | Work in progress |
| 2 | Perception (detection + state) | Under evaluation (priority) |
| 3 | Decision (RL policy) | Work in progress |
| 4 | Inputs + reward / training loop | Work in progress |

Results for each stage are reported on its tab as they become available.

## Open questions

- **Static terrain.** The detector recovers mobile entities but not bushes or
  walls. Whether static map layout can be sourced per map, rather than detected
  from pixels, is open (see [Capture](capture.qmd)).
- **Ban risk.** Emulator and automated play may be flagged by Supercell.
  Tracked as a risk, not yet mitigated (see [Inputs](inputs.qmd)).

## Data and licensing

Dataset: [bloxxy/brawl-stars-dataset](https://universe.roboflow.com/bloxxy/brawl-stars-dataset)
(10 classes, MIT). Project code is under the repository `LICENSE`.
